description: Case style: Analogue watch with silver toned, stainless steel, circular case and a black, fixed bezelDial style: Black textured dial with white accents, silver toned hour and minute hands with glow-in-the-dark inlay, orange seconds hand, white and black markings, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset the time, two face chronograph displays and a day displayStrap style: Orange and black, synthetic strap with stitch detailing, secured with a tang claspWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
